Suspicious changeset 180898087 by maemolol: "Fixing and adding a lot of relations in Carnikava"
Country: Latvia
Contributor: maemolol
Mapping Days: 29
Comment: Fixing and adding a lot of relations in Carnikava Nodes - Created: 20 Modified: 17 Deleted: 2 Ways - Created: 5 Modified: 16 Deleted: 0 Relations - Created: 0 Modified: 0 Deleted: 0
achavi: 180898087 - osmcha: 180898087
https://www.openstreetmap.org/changeset/180898087
what did i do
are you asking about the comment about the address node?
oh, i didn't notice the comment, oops
to be fair, i find it quite funny that a building that is physically Not There is still legally registered

Yeah, once you look at how official address data is assigned, it's not even for a building as such, but rather for that specific point/coordinate in that plot/property/location. Latvia just happens to have open and fairly accurate address data that can be imported to OSM. Noramlly, you would need to survey addresses from like street signs and house number plaques, so such "empty" addresses don't get added in many places. But technically there doesn't have to be a building or even anything else there - it's still the address of the location, like for legal or delivery purposes.
we even have addresses for whole streets that dont exist yet

maemolol said:

what did i do

If you were asking something like "why is my edit in chat with word suspicious in the name?", this is just an artefact of how rss b0t works.
Your changeset is mentioned here because you asked for a review =)
ah, yeah, fair enough
